expectations.text: Response references actual task titles from the vault (not invented examples)
expectations.evidence: Lists PT-3898, PT-3562, PT-3900 — all verified real task notes

expectations.text: Response focuses on hot and/or spicy priority tasks, not normal/bland ones
expectations.evidence: All suggestions are hot or spicy; used mtn list --priority hot and --priority spicy

expectations.text: Response gives a concise list (not an exhaustive dump of every task)
Response gives enough context per task to be useful — not just bare task titles
expectations.evidence: Each item includes status, priority, due date, and a brief rationale
